title: Mlx Model Path
description: Mlx Model Path file system path
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries the local filesystem path to an MLX-format model directory on Apple Silicon. MLX models have a specific directory layout that differs from GGUF or safetensors formats, so a dedicated type allows caps to route MLX-specific paths without ambiguity.

## When to use
Use this type when passing a model path between caps that are specifically designed for the MLX backend, such as an MLX download cap and an MLX inference cap. For backend-agnostic path passing use [Model Path](https://capdag.com/browse/media:model-path;textable;record).

## Notes
The path must be non-empty (min_length = 1). The directory at this path must conform to the MLX model layout expected by the target cap. This type is only meaningful on macOS with Apple Silicon; on other platforms the MLX backend is unavailable.
